200.description: Details about the selected subscription period.

schema.description: A representation of a subscription period.

IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

IdSubscription.description: Id of the Subscription related to this Subscription Period.

DateStart.description: Start Date of the Subscription Period.

DateEnd.description: End Date of the Subscription Period.

IsTrial.description: If false, the Subscription Period is not a Trial Period.

schema.title: SubscriptionPeriod
